videos.headline: Louisville goes for it on 4th-and-goal
videos.description: Louisville converts on 4th-and-goal to get into the end zone and start the scoring against Kent State.

videos.headline: Louisville's Williams breaks free for long TD run
videos.description: Louisville's Malik Williams finds the hole and sprints upfield for a 33-yard touchdown against Kent State.

videos.headline: Louisville gets the pick-six
videos.description: Louisville's Trumaine Washington gets the interception off the tipped pass and takes it to the end zone for the touchdown to extend the lead against Kent State.

videos.headline: Jackson dances into the end zone
videos.description: Louisville's Lamar Jackson evades defenders to get into the end zone with the 13-yard run.

videos.headline: Jackson helps Louisville find the end zone again
videos.description: Louisville's Lamar Jackson connects with Seth Dawkins on the 32-yard pass for the touchdown.

videos.headline: Jackson sets Louisville TD record
videos.description: Lamar Jackson's touchdown pass to Javonte Bagley is the 88th touchdown Jackson has been a part of with Louisville, setting a school record.

videos.headline: Jackson airs it deep to kick start offense
videos.description: Louisville's Lamar Jackson finds Jordan Davis for a 69-yard catch.

videos.headline: Kent State picks off Lamar Jackson
videos.description: Kent State's Demetrius Monday makes the athletic interception off of the reigning Heisman winner.

videos.headline: Louisville forces the fumble
videos.description: Louisville's defense puts the pressure on Kent State's Dustin Crum to force the fumble.

videos.headline: Jackson continues to struggle with fumble
videos.description: Louisville's Lamar Jackson fumbles the ball and Kent State recovers.

videos.headline: Squirrel 'scores' a touchdown at Louisville
videos.description: A squirrel sneaks onto the Louisville field and runs into the end zone as the crowd cheers on.

videos.headline: Jackson throws his second INT
videos.description: Kent State's Demetrius Monday intercepts Louisville's Lamar Jackson for the second time.

videos.headline: Louisville's turnover issues continue
videos.description: Louisville's Josh Johnson fumbles the ball into the end zone and Kent State recovers for the touchback.

videos.headline: Petrino on first half: 'We made some mistakes'
videos.description: Louisville head coach Bobby Petrino speaks on making some offensive mistakes in the first half against Kent State.

videos.headline: Petrino 'disappointed' with number of turnovers
videos.description: Louisville coach Bobby Petrino expresses disappointment with the number of turnovers in win over Kent State.
